'''鈭歴-ng-h''' ('''sangaha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:holk|holk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:holk|holk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-ng-h
|-
! Lemma
| sangaha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sangahithi|sangahithi]] || [[word:sangahiji|sangahiji]] || [[word:sangahishi|sangahishi]] || [[word:sangahi|sangahi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sangahuthuth|sangahuthuth]] || [[word:sangahujuj|sangahujuj]] || [[word:sangahushush|sangahushush]] || [[word:sangah|sangah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sangahuthu|sangahuthu]] || [[word:sangahuju|sangahuju]] || [[word:sangahushu|sangahushu]] || [[word:sangahu|sangahu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sangahufuth|sangahufuth]] || [[word:sangahufuj|sangahufuj]] || [[word:sangahufush|sangahufush]] || [[word:sangahuf|sangahuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sangahethe|sangahethe]] || [[word:sangaheje|sangaheje]] || [[word:sangaheshe|sangaheshe]] || [[word:sangahe|sangahe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sangahothoth|sangahothoth]] || [[word:sangahojoj|sangahojoj]] || [[word:sangahoshosh|sangahoshosh]] || [[word:sangah|sangah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sangahotho|sangahotho]] || [[word:sangahojo|sangahojo]] || [[word:sangahosho|sangahosho]] || [[word:sangaho|sangaho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sangahofoth|sangahofoth]] || [[word:sangahofoj|sangahofoj]] || [[word:sangahofosh|sangahofosh]] || [[word:sangahof|sangahof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sangah忙th忙|sangah忙th忙]] || [[word:sangah忙j忙|sangah忙j忙]] || [[word:sangah忙sh忙|sangah忙sh忙]] || [[word:sangah忙|sangah忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sangahathath|sangahathath]] || [[word:sangahajaj|sangahajaj]] || [[word:sangahashash|sangahashash]] || [[word:sangah|sangah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sangahatha|sangahatha]] || [[word:sangahaja|sangahaja]] || [[word:sangahasha|sangahasha]] || [[word:sangaha|sangaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sangahafath|sangahafath]] || [[word:sangahafaj|sangahafaj]] || [[word:sangahafash|sangahafash]] || [[word:sangahaf|sangahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sangahasha|sangahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosangahasha|gosangahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisangahasha|gokisangahasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sangahn眉sha|sangahn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosangahnkn眉sha|gosangahnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisangahn眉sha|gokisangahn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sangahsh毛sha|sangahsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosangahnksh毛sha|gosangahnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisangahsh毛sha|gokisangahsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sangahrosha|sangahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosangahnkrosha|gosangahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisangahrosha|gokisangahrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sangahmusha|sangahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosangahnkmusha|gosangahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisangahmusha|gokisangahmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sangahsherasha|sangahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosangahnksherasha|gosangahnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisangahsherasha|gokisangahsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sangahngasha|sangahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosangahnkngasha|gosangahnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisangahngasha|gokisangahngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sangahyasha|sangahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosangahnkyasha|gosangahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisangahyasha|gokisangahyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sangahyamasha|sangahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosangahnkyamasha|gosangahnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisangahyamasha|gokisangahyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sangahn眉sh毛sha|sangahn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosangahnkn眉sh毛sha|gosangahnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisangahn眉sh毛sha|gokisangahn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sangahn眉rosha|sangahn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosangahnkn眉rosha|gosangahnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisangahn眉rosha|gokisangahn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sangahn眉musha|sangahn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosangahnkn眉musha|gosangahnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisangahn眉musha|gokisangahn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sangahsh毛n眉sha|sangahsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosangahnksh毛n眉sha|gosangahnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisangahsh毛n眉sha|gokisangahsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sangahsh毛rosha|sangahsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosangahnksh毛rosha|gosangahnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisangahsh毛rosha|gokisangahsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sangahsh毛musha|sangahsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosangahnksh毛musha|gosangahnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisangahsh毛musha|gokisangahsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sangahron眉sha|sangahron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosangahnkron眉sha|gosangahnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisangahron眉sha|gokisangahron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sangahrosh毛sha|sangahrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosangahnkrosh毛sha|gosangahnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisangahrosh毛sha|gokisangahrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sangahromusha|sangahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosangahnkromusha|gosangahnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisangahromusha|gokisangahromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sangahmun眉sha|sangahmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosangahnkmun眉sha|gosangahnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisangahmun眉sha|gokisangahmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sangahmush毛sha|sangahmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosangahnkmush毛sha|gosangahnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisangahmush毛sha|gokisangahmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sangahmurosha|sangahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosangahnkmurosha|gosangahnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisangahmurosha|gokisangahmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sangah|sangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:s忙ng忙h|s忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosangah|hosangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hos忙ng忙h|hos忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosangah|hohosangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohos忙ng忙h|hohos忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉sangah|n眉sangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉s忙ng忙h|n眉s忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sangah|n眉n眉sangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉s忙ng忙h|n眉n眉s忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂sangah|n茂sangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂s忙ng忙h|n茂s忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sangah|n茂n茂sangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂s忙ng忙h|n茂n茂s忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusangah|lusangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lus忙ng忙h|lus忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusangah|lulusangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulus忙ng忙h|lulus忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisangah|lisangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lis忙ng忙h|lis忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisangah|lilisangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilis忙ng忙h|lilis忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosangah|kosangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kos忙ng忙h|kos忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosangah|kokosangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokos忙ng忙h|kokos忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesangah|kesangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kes忙ng忙h|kes忙ng忙h]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesangah|kekesangah]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekes忙ng忙h|kekes忙ng忙h]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
